title: RotProxy
description: Client-side Fabric proxy mod for Minecraft 1.21.10 and 1.21.11 with SOCKS5/HTTP/HTTPS support, kill switch protection, and 15-second heartbeat monitoring.
body:
# RotProxy

RotProxy is a client-side Fabric mod that routes Minecraft multiplayer connections through a configured proxy.

## Features

- SOCKS5, HTTP, and HTTPS proxy support
- Quick-access button on the Multiplayer screen
- In-game proxy TEST button
- Kill switch that blocks multiplayer traffic until the proxy is healthy
- 15-second heartbeat monitoring
- Exit IP and latency display
- Client-side only

## Supported Versions

- Minecraft 1.21.10
- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric

## Notes

- RotProxy stores proxy profiles locally in your Minecraft config folder.
- Release builds ship with a blank default proxy profile.
- No live host, IP, port, username, or password is included in the published files.

## Requirements

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
- Java 21
